Title: User Registration
Test Data:
- Valid username: testuser
- Valid password: testpassword
- Valid email: testuser@example.com
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the user registration page.
2. Enter the test user credentials (username, password, and email).
3. Click the "Register" button.
Expected Result: - The user is successfully registered and redirected to the login page.

Title: Invalid Username
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the user registration page.
2. Enter an invalid username (less than 3 characters).
3. Click the "Register" button.
Expected Result: - An error message is displayed, and the user is unable to register.

Title: Invalid Password
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the user registration page.
2. Enter an invalid password (less than 6 characters).
3. Click the "Register" button.
Expected Result: - An error message is displayed, and the user is unable to register.

Title: Invalid Email
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the user registration page.
2. Enter an invalid email (missing @ symbol).
3. Click the "Register" button.
Expected Result: - An error message is displayed, and the user is unable to register.

- Valid username: testuser

Title: Create Trip
Test Data:
- Trip name: Test Trip
- Trip date: 2023-01-01
- Trip category: Leisure
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the user dashboard.
2. Click the "Create Trip" button.
3. Enter the test trip details (name, date, and category).
4. Click the "Create" button.
Expected Result: - The trip is successfully created and displayed on the user dashboard.

Title: Delete Trip
Preconditions: User is logged in and has a trip created.
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the user dashboard.
2. Find the test trip and click the "Delete" button.
3. Confirm the deletion.
Expected Result: - The trip is successfully deleted and no longer displayed on the user dashboard.

Title: Create Daily Plan
Preconditions: User is logged in and has trips and plans created.
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the user dashboard.
2. Click the "Create Daily Plan" button.
3. Select a trip and a plan for the daily plan.
4. Enter the daily plan date.
5. Click the "Create" button.
Expected Result: - The daily plan is successfully created and displayed on the user dashboard.
